name: Ghetto Justice
overview: Ghetto Justice is a TVB modern drama series about a former talented lawyer who fights injustice for the people of the Sham Shui Po district in Hong Kong. The series became a success and was followed by a sequel, Ghetto Justice II.

trailers.title: 怒火街頭 | EP01精華 | 最唔似大律師嘅大律師?!
